violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Box of dry noodles on floor in basement storage.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Food removed from original packaging was not placed in a container with an impervious and nonabsorbent cover. -Containers with crab ragoon in walk in freezer not covered.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoops in spice bins had handles laying in product. Handles must be protruding away from product.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Prep table items in containers at 44-47F. -1 door white fridge at 45F.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Shelving in walk in cooler on left side is rusty and needs replaced.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean all food storage containers in walk in cooler and in walk in freezer.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean storage racks in walk in cooler. -Clean shelving below dishwasher. -Clean shelving in wait station area.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. -Do not store clean pots and pans on shelf below dishwasher.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors, walls and ceilings in kitchen need thoroughly cleaned.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. -Spray bottle by prep sink was not labeled.
